title: McCarthy Tétrault Appoints Heidi Gordon as Co-Head of its National M&A Group
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Appoints Heidi Gordon as Co-Head of its National M&A Group
McCarthy Tétrault today announced that Heidi Gordon has been appointed Co-Head of the Firm’s National Mergers & Acquisitions Group, alongside Jonathan See and Shea Small .
Based in Toronto, Heidi has a national M&A practice advising Canadian and international corporations, private equity sponsors, and institutional investors on significant public and private M&A transactions. She regularly leads complex mandates and brings together cross-disciplinary teams to support client objectives. Widely regarded by clients and peers for her strategic judgment, entrepreneurial spirit, and client-centric approach, Heidi has earned broad market recognition, including from leading legal publications such as Chambers and Partners and Lexpert .
“Heidi is a highly respected dealmaker with strong commercial judgment and a national perspective,” said Jonathan See, Co-Head of McCarthy Tétrault’s National M&A Group. “She has earned the trust of clients across industries, and her experience and judgment make her exceptionally well positioned to help lead our M&A practice.”
Cameron Belsher , who has served as Co-Head of McCarthy Tétrault’s National M&A Group for nearly a decade and previously held Firm leadership roles, including as Chair of the Board of Partners, will continue his active M&A practice. A Chambers-ranked Eminent Practitioner, Cameron is one of the Firm’s most experienced M&A partners and a trusted adviser on some of Canada’s most significant domestic and cross-border transactions. He will continue to work closely with the Firm’s M&A leadership team in support of the strength and direction of the National M&A Group.
“Cameron has played an instrumental role in the ongoing success of our M&A practice, and we are grateful for the experience and leadership he brings to the group,” said Shea Small, Co-Head of the National M&A Group. “Heidi’s appointment is a strong addition to our M&A leadership, and we look forward to the impact she will have in this role.”
McCarthy Tétrault’s National M&A Group has continued to strengthen, bringing together talented transactional lawyers across the Firm with a strong track record of advising on complex mandates across Canada. The group is recognized for its ability to mobilize the right expertise efficiently and work seamlessly across offices to support clients on sophisticated transactions.
“I’m excited to step into this role alongside Jonathan and Shea,” said Heidi Gordon. “Our strength as a Firm comes from the quality of our people, our unmatched industry experience and the way we align that talent nationally to support our clients. I look forward to contributing to the continued momentum of the practice and helping domestic and international clients navigate increasingly complex M&A transactions.”
McCarthy Tétrault’s top-tier National M&A Group is anchored by a national platform with offices in Canada, New York, and London, advising on domestic and cross-border transactions across industries that are strategically important to the Canadian economy.
With experience across industries that are central to the Canadian and global business landscape, McCarthy Tétrault’s National M&A Group advises on the transactions that are most critical to our clients’ businesses, regularly acting on complex domestic and cross-border mandates involving mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures, and strategic partnerships. Clients benefit from our industry-informed perspective and our ability to deliver practical, commercially focused advice, regardless of deal size or complexity. Our team acts for public and private companies, financial sponsors, and other market participants, drawing on a fully integrated, national platform to help clients achieve their transaction objectives. Learn how our team can help you.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
